name: "Fragrant Confluence"
description: A flower rack commonly found in the flower shops of Millhaven, where rows of potted blossoms grow in lively abundance, each pot a source of flourishing life and a rich, lingering aroma.\nWhile fresh-cut flowers in vases may only last a few days, potted plants can keep their fragrance much longer. Still, learning how to properly care for a living plant has proven to be quite the challenge for many people...
